scope: Canonical Slice eyedropper coordinate mapping through zoom, pan and device pixel ratio.

assertions: DPR + zoom + viewport offset map to the expected backing pixel
outside-source click does not publish a color
Escape cancels the active canonical picker

rejected: Legacy-only callback path: canonical Slice now supplies an explicit eyedropper seam and legacy interaction remains null.
CSS-only coordinate math: source mapping is validated with the existing hostile-safe wand coordinate primitive and backing-canvas pixel read.
Stuck tool state: successful pick and Escape both leave the picker inactive; outside-source clicks do not publish a color.
Silent layout/runtime regression: production Chrome reports zero errors, zero unlabeled interactives and no viewport overflow.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: The picker reads the rendered source canvas RGB. Transparent/checkerboard semantics and chroma control composition remain G4-03/G4-05 work; no alpha channel is persisted by the existing color-input contract.

verification.build: pass (known JSZip dynamic-import and >500kB chunk warnings remain baseline)
verification.diffCheck: pending at artifact creation; run before commit
